title: CMS Application
description: Designed and developed both frontend (User View) and backend CMS for Lippo Mall Indonesia. Built frontend using NextJS with responsive design. Developed seamless custom CMS using Laravel and React.

title: Styles — Lippo Member's App
description: Developed mobile UI based on Figma designs for Lippo Mall Indonesia's member application. Created CI/CD pipelines for production deployment.

title: HR Recruitment App
description: Built a fullstack HR recruitment system with AI-powered CV screening. Finetuned models for targeted responses. Integrated OCR for automated document processing.

title: Contract Management System
description: Designed and developed a fullstack web application to streamline contract management between companies and clients with responsive UI and robust backend services.

title: On-Premise Document Collaboration
description: Developed a real-time collaborative editing tool for Bank Indonesia. Integrated CKEditor with WebSocket support for multi-user editing. Managed on-premise infrastructure on OCP.

title: Huawei Product Portfolio Web
description: Developed frontend application for promoting company product portfolio with responsive mobile-first design.

title: Motorcycle Price Prediction
description: Built a deep learning model deployed on Flask with a React frontend. Designed the API system for communication between the frontend and the prediction model.
